etymology.description: semantic 亻(人) (rén, "person") + phonetic 叚(叚) (jià) -> holiday; vacation
etymology.interpretation: The character 假 combines the semantic element 亻(人) (rén, "person") suggesting human activity or state, with the phonetic 叚(叚) (jià) to form the meaning related to taking a break or time off from daily duties, represented by the concept of 'holiday' or 'vacation'.

examples.chinese: 我决定在暑假(我決定在暑假)去旅行(去旅行)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ juédìng zài shǔjià qù lǚxíng.
examples.english: I decided to travel during the summer vacation.

examples.chinese: 假期(假期)时(時)，我们去海滩度假(我們去海灘度假)。
examples.pinyin: Jiàqī shí, wǒmen qù hǎitān dùjià.
examples.english: During the holiday, we went to the beach for vacation.

examples.chinese: 她申请了两周的假期(她申請了兩週的假期)，以便更好地放松(以便更好地放鬆)。
examples.pinyin: Tā shēnqǐngle liǎng zhōu de jiàqī, yǐbiàn gèng hǎo de fàngsōng.
examples.english: She applied for a two-week vacation to relax better.
